task_completion.description: Create the node and edge XML files for the highway merge scenario.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for terminal commands, editor windows, or script outputs showing the creation of 'highway_merge.nod.xml' (containing at least 4 nodes) and 'highway_merge.edg.xml' (defining a 3-lane highway before merge, 1-lane on-ramp, and 3-lane highway after merge with specified speeds).
Look for the execution of the 'netconvert' command in the terminal (or via a script) combining the node and edge files, or an 'ls' command showing 'highway_merge.net.xml' has been created.

task_completion.description: Create the route and detector XML files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for the creation of 'highway_merge.rou.xml' (showing mainline flow of 1200 veh/hr and ramp flow of 400 veh/hr) and 'highway_merge.det.xml' (showing an E1 induction loop with freq="300" and file="detector_output.xml").
Look for the creation of 'highway_merge.sumocfg' that links the network, route, and detector files, and includes time settings for 0 to 1800 seconds.

Look for the execution of the 'sumo' command (e.g., 'sumo -c highway_merge.sumocfg') in the terminal, followed by SUMO logging output indicating the simulation is running or has completed successfully.

task_completion.description: Verify the generation of the required output files.
task_completion.visual_evidence: Look for an 'ls' command or file explorer view in '/home/ga/SUMO_Output/highway_merge/' showing that both 'tripinfo.xml' and 'detector_output.xml' exist.

integrity.description: Verify that the output files were generated by an actual SUMO simulation.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent ran the 'sumo' command or a valid SUMO Python API (like traci/sumolib) rather than just creating empty files using 'touch tripinfo.xml detector_output.xml'.

integrity.description: Verify that the network file was generated properly.
integrity.visual_evidence: Check that the agent used 'netconvert' to generate the .net.xml file rather than attempting to manually write a complex compiled SUMO network file or downloading a pre-made one.

integrity.description: Verify the agent did not manually write the contents of the simulation output files.
integrity.visual_evidence: Ensure there are no text editor windows or echo commands manually writing XML data directly into 'tripinfo.xml' or 'detector_output.xml'.

privileged_info_for_vlm: The working directory is verified as /home/ga/SUMO_Output/highway_merge. The agent must create all files from scratch as no external datasets are provided. The final expected output files generated by the simulation are tripinfo.xml and detector_output.xml.
